_meta.task: PROPOSAL ONLY — DO NOT APPLY (integration-bus instruction 2026-05-23T11:00:00+08:00 §3)
_meta.produced_by: stock-quant orchestrator (acting as quant role for the integration-bus protocol)
_meta.supersedes: reobsidian-kb-contracts/schemas/entry.json $defs.DecisionPayload at HEAD 9d43b2f5e6f7a538c220827ed1ffa4a1dcecc8d4 (2026-04-29). That block describes the pre-ADR-0013 M0/Phase-1 ad-hoc shape {action, candidate_signal_ids, arbitration} which has been replaced unilaterally by ADR-0013.
_meta.next_review: kb-side maintainer + integration-bus orchestrator. Quant requests KB confirm whether the schema admits unilateral amendment via PR (routing then upgrades to 'mixed' for the schema-bump) OR whether quant must instead revert prod to the signed shape (routing stays 'quant_internal' with the revert being the interim measure). See instruction's hard-rule §3.

proposed_$defs.DecisionPayload.title: DecisionPayload
proposed_$defs.DecisionPayload.description: PROPOSED replacement for the existing $defs.DecisionPayload (HEAD 9d43b2f, 2026-04-29). The signed block describes a pre-ADR-0013 shape (M0/Phase-1 ad-hoc {action, candidate_signal_ids, arbitration}). Stock-quant landed ADR-0013 (2026-05-17, architect + cyril solo, quant-ratified, no reobsidian counter-party) which replaced that vocabulary entirely, then ADR-0023 (2026-05-19, same author/decider) amended decision_to_entry's entities[] projection. The post-ADR-0013/0023 shape below is what stock-quant's prod KBSink.deliver currently sends and what the daemon rejects with VALIDATION_FAILED (handoff/quant-decision-probe-2026-05-23.json, request_id=kb-req-QTaGfN0ar). Routing audit: quant_internal — the contracts repo schema was never updated when the ADRs landed. This PROPOSAL is a sibling-amendment candidate; KB + orchestrator review before any apply to the contracts repo.

decision_id.description: ULID (Crockford base32, 26 chars). Stable cross-PATCH identifier used by red-team (ADR-0014) Dissent envelopes to back-reference + by downstream consumers for join keys. EXCLUDED from idempotency_key derivation per ADR-0013 §'Idempotency-Key derivation' (post-generated at emit time). Authoritative source: ADR-0013.

agent_id.description: Always 'arbiter' at v0.1.0 (ADR-0013). Duplicated in entry.source.id; kept inside payload for backward-readable archives where source.id might be aliased.

agent_version.description: Semantic version of the arbiter agent (e.g. '0.1.0'). Duplicated in entry.source.version.

symbol.description: A-share ticker the decision applies to. ADR-0013 + skeleton §6.1 contract.

direction.description: Decision direction (ADR-0013). Replaces the pre-ADR-0013 'action' enum (open/add/reduce/close/hold/rebalance) — the arbiter contracts are binary-direction, not position-state-transitions. Auto-tagged as tag 'direction:{BUY|SELL|HOLD}' on entry.tags (ADR-0013 §KB Entry mapping).

conviction.description: Decision conviction [0,1] (ADR-0013). Hoisted to entry.confidence per ADR-0013 §KB Entry mapping ('hoisted by KB design, entry.json:91'); carried inside payload too for archival completeness. The Entry-level confidence field already admits this (entry.json $defs Entry/properties/confidence is number 0..1, nullable).

horizon_bucket.description: ADR-0011 HorizonBucket vocabulary (1d/5d/10d/20d/60d). Replaces the pre-ADR-0013 'horizon' enum (intraday/1-2d/2-5d/5-20d/20-60d/60d+) — the stock-quant reasoning-layer contracts ADR-0011 standardized on point-bucket anchors, not range-bucket strings. Auto-tagged as tag 'horizon:{bucket}' on entry.tags. If a coarser cross-system vocabulary is desirable, the bus should negotiate that — but the prod path is anchored on ADR-0011.

position_size_recommendation.description: Fraction of allowed position [0,1] (ADR-0013). Renamed from the pre-ADR-0013 'size_pct'. Per ADR-0013 §position-cap, the arbiter agent enforces the skeleton-§6.1.1 ≤ 0.10 hard cap at emit boundary (the Pydantic bound is permissive at [0,1] to leave room for M5+ to lift the cap by-agent without a contract bump).

systemic_risk_ceiling.description: R4 position_ceiling at decision time (ADR-0013 + the R4 ratification docs/quant/m2-t17-r4-ratification.md item 3 floor=0.25). Bounds the arbiter's accepted position scaling under systemic risk. Not in the pre-ADR-0013 shape.

evidence_refs.description: Back-pointers to R-signal envelope idempotency-keys (ADR-0013 + ADR-0011 EvidenceRef reuse). Replaces the pre-ADR-0013 'candidate_signal_ids' (plain string list) — evidence_refs carry a richer typed sub-shape (ref, source, weight, observed_at) per ADR-0011 §EvidenceRef. The DecisionPayload $defs MUST reference the existing #/$defs/EvidenceRef block — no shape duplication. min_length=1: arbiter cannot emit a Decision without at least one R-signal input.

llm_path_used.description: True iff the LLM slow-path was invoked (Case C or fallback) per ADR-0013. Auto-tagged as tag 'llm_path:true/false'. Not in the pre-ADR-0013 shape.

llm_cost_usd.description: Per-decision LLM cost in USD (ADR-0013). 0.0 when llm_path_used=False. Consumed by the cost-alerts aggregation (src/stock_quant/llm/cost_alerts.py). Not in the pre-ADR-0013 shape.

conflict_detected.description: True iff the arbiter rule path classified inputs as Case C (rule-irreconcilable conflict) per ADR-0013. Auto-tagged as tag 'conflict_detected:true/false'.

conflict_resolved_by.description: How the arbiter resolved the conflict: 'rule' (Case A/B/D — rule-decidable), 'llm' (Case C — LLM slow-path), 'unresolved' (abstained). Auto-tagged as tag 'resolved_by:{rule/llm/unresolved}'. ADR-0013.

reason.description: Human-readable rationale (ADR-0013, ≤2000 chars). Top-level on payload for archive readability — moved out of the pre-ADR-0013 'arbitration.reason' nested location because the arbitration sub-object was removed in ADR-0013's flatter shape.

red_team_dissent_id.description: ULID of the red-team Dissent that back-references this Decision. NULL at emit time; PATCH-updated by red-team agent (ADR-0014). EXCLUDED from idempotency_key derivation. Replaces the pre-ADR-0013 nested 'redteam' sub-object (strength/challenges/verdict) — the Dissent envelope is now a separate KB Entry (category=event, tag:red_team_dissent per ADR-0014), joined by id back-reference.

proposed_$defs.DecisionPayload.$comment_required_rationale: REQUIRED reflects ADR-0013's load-bearing emit guarantees. Excluded from required: agent_id (defaultable 'arbiter'), agent_version (Pydantic-enforced, can default), symbol (Pydantic-pattern-enforced, can default-include — though prod always emits), red_team_dissent_id (nullable post-hoc PATCH per ADR-0014). The pre-ADR-0013 required [action, candidate_signal_ids, arbitration] is fully obsolete — none of those keys exist in the post-ADR-0013 shape.
proposed_$defs.DecisionPayload.$comment_additionalProperties: Intentionally NOT setting additionalProperties: false here. ADR-0011 established EventPayload-level additionalProperties permissiveness (unset = true under JSON Schema 2020-12) for forward-compatibility with quant-side fields KB doesn't yet index. ADR-0013 §additionalProperties confirms this applies to Decision too. Future fields (e.g. R5 crowding flag M5+) can land without a schema bump.
$comment_field_removed_pre_adr_0013: action (replaced by direction; semantically narrower — direction is the arbiter's decision; action is a position-management verb that belongs at the execution layer, not the arbiter contract).
candidate_signal_ids (replaced by evidence_refs with richer EvidenceRef shape).
arbitration.{path,confidence,reason} (flattened: path/confidence absorbed into conflict_resolved_by/conviction; reason hoisted to top-level).
risk_check (moved to a separate KB Entry pattern OR per-decision attached via the ADR-0023 operator surface; NOT in the M2 Decision contract).
redteam (replaced by red_team_dissent_id back-ref + separate Dissent Entry per ADR-0014).
disprove (defers to ADR-0035 Disprove DisproveRecord — separate Entry kind, M6).
outcome (post-hoc PATCH path is unchanged; lives in a separate $defs.DecisionOutcome block OR remains as an optional property — orchestrator + KB to decide on review).
proposed_$defs.DecisionPayload.$comment_outer_entry_confidence_hoist: Decision.conviction (payload) is hoisted to entry.confidence (top-level, outer Entry definition). The existing entry.json $defs Entry/properties/confidence field is type:number, minimum:0, maximum:1, nullable — that admits the hoist without an outer Entry shape change. The description on entry.confidence currently mentions 'category=event coupling' (the EventPayload §4.0 signal contract); a non-binding doc update could note that category=decision also populates this field from DecisionPayload.conviction. No JSON Schema bump on Entry needed.

outer_Entry_confidence_note.field: entry.confidence (top-level on Entry, not in DecisionPayload)
outer_Entry_confidence_note.current_state: type:number, minimum:0, maximum:1, nullable; description mentions 'category=event coupling with skeleton §4.0 confidence'
outer_Entry_confidence_note.prod_behavior: decision_to_entry hoists Decision.conviction to entry.confidence (ADR-0013 §KB Entry mapping)
outer_Entry_confidence_note.non_binding_doc_update_recommended: Update entry.confidence's description to note that category=decision also populates this field (from DecisionPayload.conviction). No JSON Schema field-shape bump.

compatibility_notes.stock_quant_test_fixture_update_owner: the SAME instruction that lands the contract amendment (per instruction §5).
